nodes.name: entry
onEnter: say("👾 Welcome to the **Game Cheat Bot**! I know cheats for hundreds of games.")
say("🎮 What game are you looking for cheats for? (e.g. GTA V, Minecraft, The Sims 4, Red Dead Redemption 2, etc.)")

nodes.name: ask-cheat-type
onEnter:
say("What would you like to know? You can ask me:

• A **specific cheat** (e.g. *infinite health*, *unlimited money*, *all weapons*)
• **All cheats** – just type *'all cheats'* or *'give me everything'*
• A **cheat category** (e.g. *weapons*, *vehicles*, *skills*, *money*)

What cheat are you looking for?")

next.condition: includes(temp.cheatRequest, 'all') || includes(temp.cheatRequest, 'everything') || includes(temp.cheatRequest, 'full list') || includes(temp.cheatRequest, 'every cheat')

nodes.name: ask-more
onEnter:
say("Do you want to look up cheats for another game, or do you need more cheats for **" + user.gameName + "**?

• Type **'same game'** or **'more cheats'** to keep browsing this game
• Type **'new game'** or a new game name to switch games
• Type **'done'** or **'exit'** to finish")

next.condition: includes(temp.moreRequest, 'done') || includes(temp.moreRequest, 'exit') || includes(temp.moreRequest, 'bye') || includes(temp.moreRequest, 'thanks') || includes(temp.moreRequest, 'thank you') || includes(temp.moreRequest, 'no')

nodes.name: goodbye
onEnter: say("Thanks for using the Game Cheat Bot! 🎮 Happy gaming and happy cheating! 😄\nCome back anytime you need more cheats!")

nodes.name: fallback
onEnter: say("Hmm, I didn't quite get that. Let me help you find cheats! 🎮")
say("Which **game** are you looking for cheats for?")
